{{Item
| image = Breeding bone.png
| id = breeding_bone
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
}}<blockquote>Breeding Bones, when fed to two different dogs, will cause your dogs to produce a puppy!
</blockquote>
* '''Note:''' '''''Biological genders''''' are a thing in DTN so '''be careful''' when using the item.

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| [[Master Treat]] <br>+ Cooked Chicken <br>+ Cooked Cod<br>+ Cooked Porkchops<br>+ Cooked Steak
|[[File:Breeding bone crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on both of your dogs to use the item.

== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
